name: Tungsten Mining Nl
analysis: TGN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 43% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2150, stop A$0.1955, target A$0.2400 (1.28:1) — then trail it.
